footer.tagline: Building the future with cutting-edge technology.

home.heroSubtitle: We build powerful software solutions — from web & mobile apps to game development and AI agents — with the latest technologies.
home.servicesSubtitle: End-to-end software development services tailored to your needs.
home.techSubtitle: We leverage industry-leading tools and frameworks to deliver robust, scalable solutions.
home.projectsSubtitle: Real-world products built by our team.
home.ctaSectionSubtitle: Let's collaborate and turn your idea into a reality. Our team is ready to deliver.

services.webDesc: Modern, performant web applications using Next.js, Angular, and Blazor with .NET Core backends.
services.mobileDesc: Cross-platform mobile applications that deliver exceptional user experiences on iOS and Android.
services.gameDesc: Engaging game experiences built with industry-standard tools and creative design.
services.aiDesc: Intelligent automation solutions powered by AI agents to streamline your business workflows.
services.backendDesc: Scalable APIs and microservices using Go, Node.js, and .NET Core with PostgreSQL and Redis.
services.devopsDesc: CI/CD pipelines, Docker containerization, and self-hosted or cloud server management.

projects.heroSubtitle: Innovative products built by the WowSyler team.
projects.textManipulatorDesc: An autonomous text manipulation tool featuring a powerful workflow system. Chain multiple text operations — trim, append to line ends, replace values — into a single seamless flow. Designed for developers and content creators who need repeatable, automated text processing.
projects.textManipulatorLong: TextManipulator.com combines a Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS frontend with a Go backend focused on repeatable workflow execution. RabbitMQ and Redis coordinate asynchronous text-processing jobs, PostgreSQL stores workflow data reliably, and Grafana plus Uptime Kuma provide visibility into performance, availability, and operational health.
projects.airdropBotDesc: A professional, proxy-supported bot for hunting airdrops across EVM-compatible blockchain networks. Features multi-wallet support, unpredictable transaction timing to avoid detection, and each wallet is assigned its own IP address for maximum safety.
projects.airdropBotLong: AirdropBotPro.com combines a Next.js and Tailwind CSS dashboard with ASP.NET Core API services and Node.js automation workers for high-volume wallet orchestration. PostgreSQL, Redis, and RabbitMQ keep campaign state, queues, and scheduling predictable, while Grafana and Prometheus provide observability over bot activity and infrastructure.
projects.streeaDesc: A comprehensive content discovery platform for movies, series, games, books, and music. Users can browse information, read articles and reviews, comment, rate, and add content. Features a personal timeline and a unique cross-content relationship system.
projects.streeaLong: Streea.com is designed as a content platform backed by a modern distributed architecture. A Next.js and Tailwind CSS frontend works with .NET Core services, Python data processors, RabbitMQ event flows, PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, and Grafana/Prometheus observability to power discovery, indexing, and personalization.

about.heroSubtitle: A passionate team of engineers and creators building tomorrow's software today.
about.storyText1: WowSyler Teknoloji was founded with a single vision: to build exceptional software that makes a real difference. We started as a small team of passionate developers and have grown into a full-service technology company delivering web, mobile, game, and AI solutions.
about.storyText2: Our name reflects our ambition — we aim to create products that make people say "wow." Every line of code we write, every interface we design, and every system we architect is crafted with excellence in mind.
about.storyText3: Today, WowSyler serves clients across industries, delivering robust and scalable applications. We're proud of the products we've built and even more excited about what's coming next.
about.missionText: To deliver world-class software solutions that empower businesses and delight users — by combining technical excellence with creative innovation.

values.qualityDesc: We never cut corners. Every project is built to the highest standards, from architecture to UI.
values.innovationDesc: We stay ahead of the curve, adopting new technologies and approaches to deliver better solutions.
values.transparencyDesc: We communicate openly with clients and stakeholders throughout every stage of development.
values.ownershipDesc: We treat every project as if it were our own product — with dedication, care, and pride.
values.collaborationDesc: We partner closely with our clients, treating their goals as our own to deliver the best outcomes.
values.deliveryDesc: We respect deadlines and set realistic expectations, ensuring projects ship when promised.

about.expertiseSubtitle: Production-ready stacks we actively use across frontend, services, data, automation, and observability layers.

techGroupDescriptions.experience: We build user-facing experiences with modern interface stacks optimized for speed, usability, and iteration.
techGroupDescriptions.platform: We structure business logic with modular .NET, Go, Node.js, and Python services that scale cleanly.
techGroupDescriptions.data: We design persistence, cache, queue, and search layers together to support growth from day one.
techGroupDescriptions.ops: We rely on production tooling that makes deployment, monitoring, and day-to-day operations measurable.
techGroupDescriptions.automation: We bring LLM integrations, workflow automation, and observability together to ship practical AI systems.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it. Reach out and let's make something great together.
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent! We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.infoText: We're always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
contact.readyText: Every great product starts with a conversation. Send us a message and we'll get back to you quickly.

services.heroSubtitle: We build scalable products with Next.js, .NET Core, Go, Python, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch, and modern observability stacks from concept to production.
services.capabilitiesSubtitle: We deliver services that work as one product team across UX, APIs, data, infrastructure, and observability.
services.webDesc: We build fast, SEO-aware, and scalable web products with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Angular, and Blazor. When needed, we back those experiences with .NET Core, Go, and Node.js services.
services.mobileDesc: We ship products quickly with React Native and add native layers with Swift and Kotlin whenever the product requires deeper platform integration. The result is a consistent iOS and Android experience without sacrificing speed.
mobileFeatures: App Store / Google Play release flows
services.gameDesc: We approach interactive experiences together with backend services, user data, and live operations. That lets us design gamified products and content platforms that remain sustainable after launch.
services.aiDesc: We build automation systems with Python-based processors, LLM integrations, and workflow agents that accelerate operations. We also make those systems production-ready with queue, search, and observability layers.
services.backendDesc: We design high-performance services with ASP.NET Core API, .NET Core, Go, and Node.js. We combine PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, and Elasticsearch to build data, cache, queue, and search layers that grow with the product.
services.devopsDesc: We set up Docker-based delivery pipelines, self-hosted infrastructure, and modern monitoring layers. With Grafana, Prometheus, and Uptime Kuma, we make the health of your systems visible and actionable.
services.stackSectionSubtitle: Technology clusters we repeatedly use to build scalable architectures across products and client solutions.

stackGroups.experienceDesc: We use modern interface technologies for performance, usability, and fast iteration across user-facing experiences.
stackGroups.platformDesc: We structure business logic with modular services, background workers, and integration layers.
stackGroups.dataDesc: We design persistence, cache, messaging, and search layers together so products can handle scale and growth cleanly.
stackGroups.opsDesc: We make deployment and operations measurable, so the product stays reliable and transparent in production.

services.proofSubtitle: Our service offering is backed by the same stacks and architectural decisions we already use in our own products.
services.ctaText: Contact our team and let's discuss how we can help you achieve your goals.
